title: chlorocyperus mundii
side_effects: Chlorocyperus mundii can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness in individuals who consume its extracts in excessive amounts. Additionally, prolonged use of its extracts may lead to liver damage and kidney problems. Some people may also experience allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and itching, after coming into contact with its sap or leaves. Furthermore, improper use of Chlorocyperus mundii extracts may interact with certain medications, exacerbating health conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes.
